title: Dodge Block
desc: Dodge falling blocks. How long can you survive?

title: Garden Runner
desc: An endless runner through the garden. Jump, slide, survive.

title: Pepper's Mystery
desc: 15 cases. Find the culprit using clues before your stars run out.

title: Pepper's Inferno
desc: Doom-style FPS. Splat pistol, paint cannon, goo launcher. How many floors can you clear?

title: Pepper's Dungeon
desc: Top-down roguelike. Explore procedural dungeons, fight monsters, find the stairs.
